name: Consult Reference
summary: Look up playbooks, knowledge, or schemas
description:
Unified lookup tool for reference material. Use this to retrieve detailed guidance, workflow definitions, or artifact schemas.

Lookup types:
- playbook: Get workflow phases, steps, agents, and completion criteria
- knowledge: Get full content of knowledge entries from your Knowledge Menu
- schema: Get artifact type definitions with fields and validation rules
concise_description: Look up reference material by type and ID.

lookup_type.description: Type of reference to look up

id.description: ID of the playbook, knowledge entry, or artifact type to retrieve

section.description: For knowledge lookups: optional section heading to retrieve

include_examples.description: For schema lookups: include usage examples

include_validation_rules.description: For schema lookups: include validation rules

lookup_type.description: The type of lookup that was performed

content.description: The retrieved content (structure varies by lookup_type)

examples.description: Get playbook details for Story Spark workflow
Get knowledge entry for spoiler hygiene guidelines
Get artifact schema for Passage Brief
